overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a scenic grassland and lakeside environment. The character travels from open meadows through a wooded lakeside area with a wooden dock, approaching distant structures under a bright sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland with two swords on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland
sparse deciduous trees lining the path
misty tree line on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open grasslands. Scattered trees line the route while distant misty forests are visible on the horizon under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: lake water becomes visible on the right side of the path as the trail curves

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves toward the lakeshore

entered.detail: calm lake surface visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The path curves revealing a large body of water on the right. The trail continues along the lakeside with grass and wildflowers lining both sides, while scattered trees provide occasional shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded lakeside path with dock structure

events.description: passing a wooden dock structure extending into the lake on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through a denser tree section alongside the lake

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier structure extending into the water
thick cluster of trees creating a canopy over the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser wooded area with tall trees creating dappled shadows on the ground. A wooden dock structure extends into the lake on the right as the trail continues forward through the shaded forest section.

events.description: distant village structures become visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: emerging from the trees and continuing toward distant buildings

entered.detail: buildings and ruins visible on the distant horizon
gnarled dead tree trunk beside the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tree cover, the path opens into a clearing with distant structures visible ahead. The trail continues through grassy terrain toward what appears to be a small settlement or ruins, with a distinctive dead tree marking the transition.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through open grasslands that gradually reveal a scenic lakeside vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through wide meadows, where scattered trees line the route and misty forests linger on the distant horizon under a bright blue sky. As the path curves, the landscape opens up to reveal a large body of water appearing on the right. The scene then shifts to follow the trail as it hugs the shoreline, with the environment transitioning from open fields to a lakeside stretch lined with vibrant wildflowers and occasional shade from overhanging trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded woodland path that gradually opens into a bright, expansive clearing. It begins as the trail enters a dense wooded area where tall trees cast dappled shadows across the ground and a wooden dock extends into the lake on the right. As the camera continues forward through the shaded forest, the tree cover begins to thin, leading the way toward a distinctive dead tree. The scene then expands into an open grassy terrain, shifting from the enclosure of the woods to a wide vista. Finally, the path leads directly toward distant structures and a small settlement visible under the open sky.
